title: デビュー戦の後に・意外な弱点

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suffering from malnutrition, Tamamo Cross feels
faint after the race. I ask her why she chooses to
eat small portions...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains that it's to do with her impoverished
upbringing. After sharing most of her food with
her younger siblings, her stomach has shrunk over
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an effort to prove that her tiny diet won't hold
her back, Tamamo Cross challenges the hulking
Hishi Akebono to a sumo wrestling match...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the results speak for themselves... Hishi
Akebono seized victory against Tamamo Cross by
thrusting her out of the ring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With victory practically impossible at this rate, I
concoct a plan to strengthen Tamamo Cross's
body before next spring. In the meantime, we'll
build up our racing experience by entering
smaller races.
